expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Alright, I've been through everything you sent — and you're right, it's a lot to carry in your head. Here's what I can see across all of it:"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Your master trip doc"]}," covers the full August 2026 itinerary — dates, places, the two of you, the whole plan. ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["The spreadsheet"]}," has your costs lined up. The ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Ngorongoro tariffs PDF"]}," has the official park-fee figures. Your ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["voice memo"]}," from the crater fills in the on-the-ground details the documents don't — Emmanuel the driver, the bracelets for Athina Mari (~TZS 35,000), and the ranger tip (TZS 5,000) you want to ask Richard about. And the ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Stone Town photo"]}," — a gorgeous sunlit courtyard with those white stucco walls and dark carved balconies — is the kind of thing you'll want to find again later."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["If I pull all of this together into ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["one place you can open on your phone"]}," — a proper Tanzania trip hub with your itinerary, your costs, the park-fee reference, your crater-day notes and the bracelet purchase, and that photo right where you can find it — would you like me to put that together for you?"]}]}
